priority: cover as many organs as possible
candidates.cost: One fixed development fold; closest to a 30/7 internal split if the 37-image training pool is valid.

priority: fixed folds and one predeclared selection aggregate
candidates.cost: Approximately five times validation inference and more bookkeeping; better robustness than one seven-image fold.

priority: one held-out organ at a time
never use as the sole model-selection protocol
candidates.cost: High variance and multiple runs; useful only to diagnose organ transfer after G1 or G2 is fixed.

frozen_monuseg_lite_reference.policy: Reference only after every required file matches SHA256SUMS; it cannot silently define the new grouped development split.

provenance_note: Official MoNuSeg 2018 is documented as 30 training images and 14 official test images. The local 37-image training pool is non-official until filenames, cases, organs, duplicates, and source release are audited. No official-test entry or split entry is fabricated here.
